zh.lifeSummary: 當Nesta Vale於大約1237年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，她的父親Gilbert de Vale II19歲，母親Margaret de Clavering15歲。她於大約1263年與Roger Corbet在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1291年2月18日在英國武斯特斯爾享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Vale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Abilio, Angel, Fernando, Jose Joel, Miguel, Pedro, Roberto, Adriana, Alberto, Alfredo.

English: of Norman origin, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(in the) vale or valley’ (Middle English val(e), valle, Old French val ‘valley’), or a habitational name for someone who came from one of the French places called with this word, such as Le Val (Sarthe) or any number of places in and around Normandy called Vaux. Compare Vause .

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

variants.name: Vales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ricardo, Abilio, Agustin, Aldina, Arturo, Diego, Gonzalez, Jorge, Josefina, Juan Francisco.
English: variant of Vale , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Nesta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Nesta Vale was born about 1237, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert de Vale II, was 19 and her mother, Margaret de Clavering, was 15. She married Roger Corbet about 1263, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 18 February 1291, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nesta Vale est née environ 1237, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Vale II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clavering, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Corbet environ 1263, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 février 1291, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Nesta Valeが約1237年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Vale IIは19歳，母Margaret de Claveringは15歳であった。約1263年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでRoger Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1291年2月18日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nesta Vale(이)가 대략 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Vale II(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Clavering(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Roger Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 2월 18일 영국 워스스터실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nesta Vale родилась около 1237 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Vale II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clavering, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Corbet около 1263 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 18 февраля 1291 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.
